scripts.db:migrate:local: for f in drizzle/0000_simple_crystal.sql drizzle/0001_ancient_shadowcat.sql drizzle/0002_low_sharon_carter.sql drizzle/0003_complete_schema.sql drizzle/0004_remove_company_wallet.sql drizzle/0005_console_dynamic.sql drizzle/0006_simplify_settlements.sql drizzle/0007_payment_unique_checkout_tx.sql drizzle/0008_idempotency_keys.sql drizzle/0009_payment_fee_tx_hash.sql drizzle/0010_payment_locks.sql drizzle/0011_webhook_retries.sql; do wrangler d1 execute airpay-db --file=./$f; done
